evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system using collaborative filtering, content-based ranking, sentence-transformer embeddings, and gradient-boosted models
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model trained on engagement signals for warm users.

evidence.claim: Managed feature pipeline with ~200 features and A/B testing infrastructure
evidence.source_text: Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features) and the A/B testing infrastructure.

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based chatbot using OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, and GPT-4
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Recommendation system improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.
Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Chatbot deployment reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Served as de-facto ML lead on a small team
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Obtained Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2019)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks for model deployment
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience from shipping real systems over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
